# Chart Values

<!-- Generated from `chart/values.schema.json` by `task generate`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Operator

| Value                       | Type                            | Default                         | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `headscaleImage`            | `object`                        | -                               | no       | Container image for the headscale server deployed by this operator.                                                                                                                               |
| `headscaleImage.repository` | `string`                        | `ghcr.io/juanfont/headscale`    | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `headscaleImage.tag`        | `string`                        | `v0.29.0-beta.2`                | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `proxyImage`                | `object`                        | -                               | no       | Container image for the Tailscale proxy sidecar deployed per Ingress.                                                                                                                             |
| `proxyImage.repository`     | `string`                        | `tailscale/tailscale`           | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `proxyImage.tag`            | `string`                        | `v1.98.4`                       | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `image`                     | `object`                        | -                               | no       | Container image for the headmaster operator.                                                                                                                                                      |
| `image.repository`          | `string`                        | `ghcr.io/potatonode/headmaster` | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `image.tag`                 | `string`                        | `""`                            | no       | Defaults to the chart's appVersion when empty.                                                                                                                                                    |
| `image.pullPolicy`          | `Always / IfNotPresent / Never` | `IfNotPresent`                  | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `claimDefault`              | `any`                           | -                               | no       | Controls default-handler ownership for un-annotated Ingresses. null = take if unclaimed (graceful fallback); true = forcibly take ownership; false = do not claim.                                |
| `ingress`                   | `object`                        | -                               | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `ingress.enabled`           | `bool`                          | `true`                          | no       | Set to false to disable the Ingress controller. Useful when headmaster is used solely to manage HeadscaleInstance lifecycles.                                                                     |
| `webhook`                   | `object`                        | -                               | no       | -                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `webhook.enabled`           | `bool`                          | `false`                         | no       | Enable the admission webhook for HeadscaleInstance config validation. Requires cert-manager.                                                                                                      |
| `rustLog`                   | `string`                        | `info`                          | no       | Log filter directive passed as `RUST_LOG` (e.g. `info`, `operator=debug,info`).                                                                                                                   |
| `nodeSelector`              | `object`                        | `{}`                            | no       | Node labels for pod scheduling. See the [Kubernetes docs](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/#nodeselector).                                                 |
| `tolerations`               | `list`                          | `[]`                            | no       | Pod tolerations for tainted nodes. See the [Kubernetes docs](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/taint-and-toleration/).                                                      |
| `affinity`                  | `object`                        | `{}`                            | no       | Pod affinity and anti-affinity rules. See the [Kubernetes docs](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/#affinity-and-anti-affinity).                             |
| `podAnnotations`            | `object`                        | `{}`                            | no       | Annotations added to the headmaster operator pod.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `resources`                 | `object`                        | -                               | no       | Resource requests and limits for the headmaster operator container. See the [Kubernetes API reference](https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/kubernetes-api/workload-resources/pod-v1/#resources). |

## HeadscaleInstance

The following fields are set per-instance under `headscaleInstances.<name>`.

| Field                       | Type                             | Default | Required | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| --------------------------- | -------------------------------- | ------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `dnsBaseDomain`             | `string`                         | -       | yes      | Base domain for Magic DNS node hostnames (e.g. `ts.example.com`). Nodes will be reachable at `<hostname>.<dns_base_domain>` via the tailnet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `extraConfig`               | `any`                            | `{}`    | no       | Arbitrary extra configuration merged into the headscale config file. The admission webhook rejects entries that would collide with operator-managed keys: top-level `server_url`, `listen_addr`, `grpc_listen_addr`, `grpc_allow_insecure`, `metrics_listen_addr`, `unix_socket`, `unix_socket_permission`, `noise`, `database`, `policy`, and the `dns.magic_dns` / `dns.base_domain` subkeys. Other `dns.*` keys (e.g. `nameservers`, `split_dns`, `extra_records`) are deep-merged into the operator defaults. Omit this field to use defaults only. |
| `labels`                    | `object`                         | `{}`    | no       | Extra labels applied to all child resources (ConfigMap, Service, StatefulSet). Operator-managed labels (`app.kubernetes.io/name`, `instance`, `managed-by`) always win.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `policy`                    | `object`                         | -       | no       | Headscale access-control policy applied to this instance. When omitted, headscale allows all traffic by default.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `policy.inline`             | `string`                         | -       | no       | The policy document as a HuJSON or JSON string. Omit the entire `policy` field to use headscale's default allow-all mode.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `resources`                 | `object`                         | -       | no       | Resource requests and limits for the headscale container. Defaults to `50m`/`64Mi` requests and `500m`/`512Mi` limits when omitted. The entire block is replaced when provided — partial overrides (e.g. only `requests` without `limits`) leave the unset half empty, not defaulted.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `scim`                      | `object`                         | -       | no       | SCIM 2.0 server configuration. When set, the operator deploys a SCIM sidecar and validates that `spec.policy.inline` contains no `groups` key.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `scim.expireNodesOnChange`  | `bool`                           | `false` | no       | When true, expire all of a user's headscale nodes when the identifier used by `policyUserKey` changes (e.g. email change in `email` mode, username rename in `username` mode). Forces immediate OIDC re-authentication. Not needed for `external_id` mode — the ProviderIdentifier never changes. Default: false.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `scim.oidcIssuer`           | `string`                         | -       | no       | OIDC issuer URL (e.g. `"https://pocket-id.example.com"`). Required when `policyUserKey` is `"external_id"`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `scim.policyUserKey`        | `email / username / external_id` | -       | no       | Controls which identifier is written into headscale policy group entries and used to locate a user's headscale nodes for session management. Values: `"email"` (default), `"username"`, `"external_id"`. Use `"external_id"` with Pocket ID or Authentik for the most stable identifier (maps to the OIDC `sub` claim / headscale `ProviderIdentifier`).                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `scim.storage`              | `object`                         | -       | no       | Persistent storage for the external-ID mapping file.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `scim.storage.size`         | `string`                         | `1Gi`   | no       | PVC storage request (e.g. `1Gi`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `scim.storage.storageClass` | `string`                         | -       | no       | StorageClass to use. Omit to use the cluster default.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `serverUrl`                 | `string`                         | -       | yes      | Publicly-reachable URL of this headscale server, used for Magic DNS and DERP configuration (e.g. `https://headscale.example.com`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `storage`                   | `object`                         | -       | yes      | Persistent storage for the headscale SQLite database.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `storage.size`              | `string`                         | `1Gi`   | no       | PVC storage request (e.g. `1Gi`).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `storage.storageClass`      | `string`                         | -       | no       | StorageClass to use. Omit to use the cluster default.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `watchedNamespaces`         | `list(string)`                   | -       | no       | Namespaces from which `headmaster` Ingresses may reference this instance. `["*"]` (the default) allows Ingresses from any namespace; `[]` denies all; a specific list restricts to those namespaces only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
